title: Bhor Bhakti
desc: The host sheds light on the various customs and traditions followed by people across various states of India.

title: Paramavatar Shri Krishna
desc: Lord Krishna, once a naughty little child, grows up and embarks on a number of adventures to fight and eradicate evil forces and provide justice to all.

title: Kundali Bhagya
desc: Pragya Arora's long-lost sisters, Preeta and Srishti, plot their own course in fate's uncharted waters where adversities and good times go hand in hand.

title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
desc: Reet, a career-oriented woman, finds it difficult to deal with the societal pressures of marriage alongside navigating her life as a journalist.

title: Vasudha
desc: Though they have different perspectives, the amiable and endearing Vasudha works as a housekeeper in Chandrika, a business tycoon's house.

title: Meet
desc: A touching narrative of family bonds, personal growth, and everyday challenges, showing how two individuals learn to navigate life's pressures while holding onto hope and responsibility.

title: Meet
desc: Whether it be employment or an unexpected marriage to her namesake, the tomboyish and fun-loving Meet challenges social conventions and gender roles every step of the way.

title: Zindagi Ki Mehek
desc: Mahek, a talented and aspiring chef, enters a cooking competition to follow her passion. Her life takes an unexpected turn when she crosses paths with Shaurya, the arrogant judge of the competition.

title: Guddan Tumse Na Ho Payega
desc: Parv threatens to arrest Kaushalya for stealing the money unless she gets Guddan married to AJ, to which Kaushalya readily agrees. Soon, Guddan dances with the troupe but is out of synchronization.

title: Kumkum Bhagya
desc: Prarthana and Raunak meet by fate. She marries into a rich family but faces struggles. Prarthana works hard to save her marriage and secure her future, overcoming obstacles with determination.
